translations.en: a beggar, clad in the rags of a sailor, with a hook for a right hand.
translations.zh: 一位乞丐，身著水手破爛衣衫，右手以鐵鉤代替。

translations.en: "Spare a doubloon fer an old seahand?" He holds out his hand.
translations.zh: 「老海手能討幾枚銀幣嗎？」他伸出手來。

translations.en: Do you give him any money?
translations.zh: 汝要給他錢嗎？

translations.en: How much do you give?
translations.zh: 汝要給多少？

translations.en: You do not have that much.
translations.zh: 汝沒有那麼多。

translations.en: "Thank, ye kindly, matey."
translations.zh: 「多謝，兄弟，多謝了。」

translations.en: "I be Heftimus McPry, matey."
translations.zh: 「俺是赫夫提穆斯·麥普萊，兄弟。」

translations.en: "Once Buccaneer's @Den quaked at the mention o' me name."
translations.zh: 「曾幾何時，俺的名號令@Den（海盜）窩聞之色變。」

translations.en: "I was the greatest sabre fighter on all the high seas."
translations.zh: 「俺曾是整片公海上最了不起的軍刀武士。」

translations.en: "Then one day..."
translations.zh: 「後來有那麼一天……」

translations.en: "I fought Captain @Hawkins, that scurvy dog, an' he struck off me @hand with his sword."
translations.zh: 「俺與那不要臉的@Hawkins（霍金）斯船長交戰，他用劍砍下了俺的@hand（手）。」

translations.en: "'Twas a bitter fight; I almost died o' the wound."
translations.zh: 「那一仗打得慘烈；俺差點因傷而亡。」

translations.en: "Hawkins threw me hand to the sharks."
translations.zh: 「霍金斯把俺的手扔給了鯊魚。」

translations.en: "He be long gone now, he an' his ship the Empire. A pox on his memory!"
translations.zh: 「他和他那艘帝國號早已消失無蹤。詛咒他的亡靈！」

translations.en: "That be an island, matey, and no place fer a decent soul like yerself."
translations.zh: 「那是個海島，兄弟，不是好人該去的地方，像汝這樣的。」

translations.en: "That bit o' news will cost ye twenty coins. What say ye, matey? Aye or nay?"
translations.zh: 「那個消息要二十枚金幣。兄弟，汝意下如何？要還是不要？」

translations.en: "I've been into the dungeon @Wrong."
translations.zh: 「俺去過地下城@Wrong（錯道）。」

translations.en: "There's a @cave on this island that looks a lot safer."
translations.zh: 「此島上有個@cave（洞穴），看起來安全多了。」

translations.en: "I sleep in front of it every night."
translations.zh: 「俺每晚就睡在洞穴口前。」

translations.en: "Soon as I've saved up a stake, I'm going in there to dig for gold."
translations.zh: 「等俺積攢夠了本錢，就進去挖黃金。」

translations.en: "'Twas certainly the wrong place for an old seadog to be!"
translations.zh: 「那對一個老水手來說確實是個不該去的地方！」

translations.en: He laughs, chokes, and coughs for a while.
translations.zh: 他大笑起來，笑得嗆咳了好一陣子。

translations.en: "I'll be allright, matey."
translations.zh: 「俺沒事，兄弟。」

translations.en: "Good journey."
translations.zh: 「一路平安。」

translations.en: "Sorry, don't really know that."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，俺真的不知道那個。」

translations.en: "Then maybe ten? Aye or nay?"
translations.zh: 「那十枚如何？要還是不要？」

translations.en: "So be it, matey."
translations.zh: 「如此便罷，兄弟。」

translations.en: "I can't help ye, matey."
translations.zh: 「俺幫不上汝，兄弟。」

translations.en: "Hmm."
"I thank ye kindly, matey. The last I saw o' that bit o' parchment..."
translations.zh: 「多謝，兄弟。俺最後一次見到那片羊皮紙的時候……」

translations.en: "I needed it to start a fire in a @dungeon."
translations.zh: 「俺要用它在@dungeon（地）下城裡生火。」

translations.en: "But afore I could apply sparks to the tinder, a huge swarm o' rats drove me away."
translations.zh: 「但就在俺要點火之前，一大群老鼠把俺趕了出來。」

translations.en: "The scrap o' map lies in the dungeon @Wrong, matey."
translations.zh: 「那片地圖碎片就在@Wrong（錯道）地下城裡，兄弟。」

translations.en: "Pah!" He spits on the ground.
translations.zh: 「呸！」他往地上吐了口唾沫。

translator_notes: 赫夫提穆斯是個老水手乞丐，語氣帶海員腔（「俺」自稱、「兄弟」稱對方）。dungeon Wrong 的雙關（Wrong=錯誤的地方）在中文譯為「錯道」，保留雙關意味。doubloon 等海事幣制詞彙以「銀幣」意譯。
